fewShots.question: [user_id: user_123] how many accounts does this user have?
[user_id: user_123] Show my transactions in the groceries category.
fewShots.query:
SELECT t.id AS transaction_id, t.amount, t.type, t.category, t.status, t.created_at

FROM dbo.transactions t

INNER JOIN dbo.accounts a ON t.from_account_id = a.id OR t.to_account_id = a.id

WHERE a.user_id = 'user_123'

AND LOWER(t.category) = 'groceries'
